Text.TxtId: [Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Activate mover transfer failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Actual position is outside of movement area. Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] BTN '{1}' was identified multiple times.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] C setpoint is unreachable at this position. Initiating mover stop.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Canceled mover transfer because of interrupted DC synchronization.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Canceling Mover transfer not possible. Relevant data is currently exchanged.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Commanded Part OID from NC (0x{1,X}) not found.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Connection has been interrupted
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not cancel mover transfer
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not create multicomputing command (HRESULT: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not determine NC cycle time. Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not enter movement area
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not finish mover adoption
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not finish mover adoption.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not process all responses ({1} of {2})
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reach defined start height
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reserve mover for system transfer.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reset Tile
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] DC link voltage of {1} tile(s) is not ok, e.g. tile 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] DC synchronization interrupted during mover transfer.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Defined external feedback parametrization set could not be found.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Defined parametrization set could not be found. Hence, parameters haven't been changed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Determined mover orientation is uncertain.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Disabling time invalid. Must be between 0.1 s and 4.0 s.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] During payload identification process the force or power limits by the tile were exceeded and the result would be meaningless.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Enabling height invalid. Must be between 0.5 mm and 5.0 mm.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Enabling time invalid. Must be between 0.1 s and 4.0 s.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] EtherCAT communication is lost. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] External feedback deviation too large on axis {1}.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Failed to retrieve external feedback interface. Check the external feedback OID parameter is correct.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs have not changed since last cycle.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs implausible switch position (expected: {1}, actual: {2}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs were missed for one cycle.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Feedback error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Finishing mover submission failed
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Hardware error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Identified BTN '{1}' is not configured.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Implausible mover position. Mover was removed from current movement area.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] In TwinCAT Measurement Bode Plot an NC2 axis has been chosen to be measured that was previously not linked in the mover tmc.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Initialization failed
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid basic inertia. Basic inertia is set to standard inertia (plain mover).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid controller parameters of axis {1}. Controller parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid external feedback observer parameters of axis {1}. Observer parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid feedforward parameters of axis {1}. Feedforward parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid Kalman filter parameters of axis {1}. Kalman filter parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid mover feedback. Mover was removed from current movement area.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid observer parameters of axis {1}. Observer parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid payload inertia. Payload inertia is set to zero.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid tile firmware. Firmware version must at least be 4. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters are below zero. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters are equal to zero in at least 1 DOF. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters exceed the maximum limit. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are below zero. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are equal to zero in at least 1 DOF. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are greater than the maximum force parameters. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters exceed the maximum limit. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mismatch of Submovers positions.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover 0x{1,X} is not able to identify.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover bumper exceeds the tile area. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot be reenabled right now because the current NC setpoints are out of range.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot be reset because part does not reset.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot enable because the part and the tiles could not be enabled. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication not possible. Either no ID bumper is configured or the configured mover type does not allow communication.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication of mover 0x{1,X} failed. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover file transfer failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover has an error. Communication attempt is aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is activated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is between to XPlanar systems and mover transfer is not activated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is not allowed to leave movement area when it is activated. Disable mover first!
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is not assigned to any movement area. Enabling is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is on part with error. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is rotated and cannot be orientated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is rotated. Enabling is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover orientation determination is not allowed for the configured mover type.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover position changed during communication. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover uses deactivated part. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] NC mapping error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No communication could be established with the mover. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No free capacity
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No free transfer variables left. Please check configuration of XPlanarPeer.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No memory can be assigned the software coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No movers were found on the system. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No rotation feedback available. Initiating mover stop.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Observer error. Invalid observer parameters seem to be configured.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One of submovers touch the power limit, and the coupling is disabled.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One or more Parts used by the mover have an error. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One tile of this part has an error. The part, its tiles and its movers are shutting down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Part 0x{1,X} has an error. {2} tiles of this part have an error. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Part redetection is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Peers with the same target musst be assigned to the same task
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Position offset out of allowed range ({1} axis)
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Position setpoints are unreachable (axis = {1}; position setpoint = {2,f}; actual position = {3,f}). Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Power supply temperature ({1,f} °C) exceeds the limit of {2,f} °C. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Preparation for mover communication of mover 0x{1,X} failed. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Preparation of adoption system failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Reconnected system (System ID: {1}) is not the same as the initially connected system (System ID: {2})
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Removed Mover from movement area due to lost EtherCAT connection of one or more used Tiles
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Software coupling cannot be initialized. Check parameters and movers' positions.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submission setup failed (HRESULT: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submover has an error in software coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submovers are in different movement areas.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] System could not be switched on. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Target system reported an error. Communication has been terminated.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The active index is not available.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The configured BTN '{1}' was not identified on the system.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The determined orientation of mover 0x{1,X} is uncertain. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The message received from the mover is invalid. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The number of submovers is not supported for the coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The setpoints for the software coupling are invalid.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The signal level of the mover answer is too low. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The submover's control is off.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] There is either no payload on the mover to be detected or the payload is too light (less than 0.1 kg).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile DC link voltage too low. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile hardware warning (Value of CoE register 0x81430: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile temperature {1} ({2,f} °C) exceeds the limit of {3,f} °C. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Transmission of the message to the mover failed. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover firmware. Firmware version must be greater than 3. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover type. Mover 0x{1,X} is a mover type that cannot communicate.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover type. Mover 0x{1,X} is a mover type which orientation cannot be determined yet.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} mover(s) are activated, e.g. mover 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} mover(s) have an error, e.g. mover 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} tile(s) have an invalid firmware version, e.g. tile 0x{2,X}. Firmware must be at least version 4. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
A fragment timeout has occurred.
Access denied – secure ADS access denied.
Text.Text: Zugriff Verweigert – Secure ADS Zugriff verweigert.

Text.TxtId: Access denied.
Adc error
AdsTransMode is not supported.
Allocation locked – memory error.
AMS Sync error.
AMS Sync Timeout.
AMS Sync Win32 error.
APS4322-7000 Drive
Assignment of ExternalFeedbackParametrizationSet failed!
BTN '{0}' was found at position {1}/{2} and assigned to mover object 0x{3,X}.
Class ID is invalid.
Command rejected! Empty interface would have been used ...
Communication in progress...
Context – forward to dispatch level.
Context – forward to passive level.
Context – forward to real-time.
Control handed over to adoption system
Coordinated mover communication finished.
Coordinated mover communication started to determine orientations of all movers without turning.
Coordinated mover communication started to determine orientations of all movers.
Coordinated mover communication started to identify and assign movers if possible.
Coordinated mover communication started to identify and find all configured movers.
Coordinated mover communication started to read BTN of all movers.
Demo license prohibited.
Determined NC cycle time: {0} s
Determined target with SystemID: {0}
Device (server) is in invalid state.
Device has a timeout.
Device is busy.
Device is not initialized.
Device is not ready to operate.
Disabling of external feedback failed!
Enabling of external feedback failed!
Error acknowledged!
Error in Win32 subsystem
Exception at system startup.
fan not spinning/fan not connected
Finished mover submission
General device error.
General Error
Hash table overflow.
Host unreachable.
Index out of Bounds! Object is not existing or not initialized...
Initialization of Group {0} failed!
Initialization of MC-Environment {0} failed!
Initialization of McMover {0} failed!
Initialization of MovementArea {0} failed!
Initialization of Mover {0} failed!
Initialization of ParametrizationSet {0} failed!
Initialization of Part {0} failed!
Initialization of Tile {0} failed!
Initialization of Track {0} failed!
Initialization of Xpu {0} failed!
Insufficient memory.
Interface query failed.
Internal error
Internal error in Ads sync.
Internal error.
Invalid alignment.
Invalid AMS fragment.
Invalid AMS length.
Invalid AMS Net ID.
Invalid AMS port.
Invalid array index.
Invalid certificate.
Invalid client timeout value.
Invalid data value(s).
Invalid function ID.
Invalid index group.
Invalid index offset.
Invalid operating system context. This can result from use of ADS function blocks in different tasks.
Text.Text: Ungültiger Kontext vom Betriebssystem. Kann durch Verwendung von ADS Bausteinen in unterschiedlichen Tasks auftreten.

Text.TxtId: Invalid OTCID (0x{0,X})
Invalid parameter value(s).
Invalid platform level.
Invalid response received
Invalid signature.
Invalid symbol version. This can occur due to an online change. Create a new handle.
Text.Text: Symbol-Version ist ungültig. Kann durch einen Online-Change auftreten. Erzeuge einen neuen Handle.

Text.TxtId: Invalid task ID.
Invoke ID is already in use.
Text.Text: Die Invoke-ID ist bereits in Benutzung.

Text.TxtId: Key not found in hash table.
Text.Text: Schlüssel in der Hash-Tabelle nicht gefunden.

Text.TxtId: License file is read twice.
License is exceeded.
License is expired.
License is invalid.
License not limited in time.
License not valid for this system ID.
Text.Text: Lizenz nicht gültig für diese System-ID.

Text.TxtId: License problem: System ID is invalid.
License problem: Time in the future.
License time period is too long.
Locked memory cannot be allocated.
Text.Text: Lockierter Speicher kann nicht zugewiesen werden.

Text.TxtId: Low installation level – TwinCAT 2 license error.
Text.Text: Installations-Level ist zu niedrig – TwinCAT 2 Lizenzfehler.

Text.TxtId: Mailbox full – the ADS message could not be sent. Reducing the number of ADS messages per cycle will help.
Text.Text: Postfach voll – Es konnte die ADS Nachricht nicht versendet werden. Reduzieren der Anzahl der ADS Nachrichten pro Zyklus bringt Abhilfe.

Text.TxtId: Manages all XPlanar event logger messages
Missing license.
module overtemperature
More Environments({0}) found than parameterized in "Param_TcIoXPlanarEnvironment"!
More ExtFeedbackParametrizationSets({0}) found than parameterized in "Param_TcIoXPlanarEnvironment"!

Mover adoption is done
Mover communication finished successfully.
Mover communication started.
Mover detectec at TransferArea. Enable mover transfer for feedback update.
Mover file transfer finished successfully.
Mover file transfer started.
Mover orientation determination finished successfully.
Mover orientation determination started.
Mover redetection started
Mover submission initiated
Mover with object ID 0x{0,X} was removed from the system.
Mover-OID 0x{0,X} from system {1} requested mover adoption of Mover-OID 0x{2,X}
No AMS address.
No debugging available.
No further notification handles.
No index map for AMS Sync available.
Text.Text: Keine Index-Map für AMS Sync vorhanden.

No memory.
No real-time.

Not found (files, ...).

Notification handle is invalid.

Object already exists.
Object ID is invalid.
Objects do not match.
Outside the valid range.
Overcurrent error

Overcurrent error values (raw) {0}, {1}, {2}
Overcurrent error values {0}, {1}, {2}

Overtemperature warning at sensor '{0}', temperature: {1} °C
Overvoltage DC-Link
Parameter is not supported by this tile type ({0})
Parameter size is not correct.
Polling list is empty.
Port already connected.
Port disabled – TwinCAT system service not started.
Text.Text: Port deaktiviert – TwinCAT System Service nicht gestartet.

Text.TxtId: Port is not open.
Port not connected.
Preparing movers for communication.
Public key not known from OEM.
Text.Text: Public Key vom OEM nicht bekannt.

Text.TxtId: Reading or writing is not permitted.
Text.Text: Lesen oder Schreiben ist nicht gestattet.

Text.TxtId: Rearrange movers.
Reconnected to target
Registration of FB_ExternalFeedback failed!
Request is aborted.
Request pending.
Requested mover submission to Mover-OID 0x{0,X} of system {1}
Service contains an invalid parameter.
Service is not supported by the server.
Text.Text: Service wird vom Server nicht unterstützt.

Text.TxtId: Signal warning.
Symbol is not active.
Symbol was not found.
Sync port is locked.
Syntax error in file or command.
Target computer not found – AMS route was not found.
Target port not found – ADS server is not started or is not reachable.
Text.Text: Ziel-Port nicht gefunden – ADS Server ist nicht gestartet oder erreichbar.

Text.TxtId: TCP send error.
The debug mailbox has reached the maximum number of possible messages.
Text.Text: Das Debug Postfach hat die maximale Anzahl der möglichen Meldungen erreicht.

Text.TxtId: The mailbox has reached the maximum number for fragmented messages.
Text.Text: Das Postfach hat die maximale Anzahl für fragmentierte Nachrichten erreicht.

Text.TxtId: The mailbox has reached the maximum number of possible messages.
Text.Text: Das Postfach hat die maximale Anzahl der möglichen Meldungen erreicht.

Text.TxtId: The maximum number of ports has been reached.
The port is invalid.
The port is not registered.
The port is removed.
The port number is already assigned.
The port type is unknown.
The router memory size could not be changed.
Text.Text: Die Größe des Routerspeichers konnte nicht geändert werden.

Text.TxtId: This tile type has no subdevices!
Timeout has occurred – the remote terminal is not responding in the specified ADS timeout.
Text.Text: Timeout ist aufgetreten – Die Gegenstelle antwortet nicht im vorgegebenen ADS Timeout.

Text.TxtId: TLS send error – secure ADS connection failed.
Text.Text: TLS Sendefehler – Secure ADS Verbindung fehlgeschlagen.

Text.TxtId: Took control of arriving mover
TwinCAT Router is not active.
Text.Text: Der TwinCAT Router ist nicht aktiv.

Text.TxtId: TwinCAT Router is not initialised.
Text.Text: Der TwinCAT Router ist nicht initialisiert.

Undervoltage Us/Us not connected

Win32 error.

Wrong interface is requested.

The port is removed.

Unknown command ID.
Invalid task ID.
No IO.
Unknown AMS command.
Win32 error.
Port not connected.
Invalid AMS length.
Invalid AMS Net ID.
Low installation level – TwinCAT 2 license error.
No debugging available.
Port disabled – TwinCAT system service not started.
Port already connected.
AMS Sync Win32 error.
AMS Sync Timeout.
AMS Sync error.
No index map for AMS Sync available.
Invalid AMS port.
No memory.
TCP send error.
Host unreachable.
Invalid AMS fragment.
TLS send error – secure ADS connection failed.
Access denied – secure ADS access denied.
Writing dump file: {0}
Mover redetection started
Determined target with SystemID: {0}
Reconnected to target
Coordinated mover communication started to identify and find all configured movers.
Coordinated mover communication finished.
BTN '{0}' was found at position {1}/{2} and assigned to mover object 0x{3,X}.
Mover with object ID 0x{0,X} was removed from the system.
Coordinated mover communication started to identify and assign movers if possible.
Coordinated mover communication started to read BTN of all movers.
Coordinated mover communication started to determine orientations of all movers.
Coordinated mover communication started to determine orientations of all movers without turning.
Preparing movers for communication.
Communication in progress...
Rearrange movers.
Determined NC cycle time: {0} s
Mover communication started.
Mover communication finished successfully.
Mover orientation determination started.
Mover orientation determination finished successfully.
Mover file transfer started.
Mover file transfer finished successfully.
Requested mover submission to Mover-OID 0x{0,X} of system {1}
Took control of arriving mover
Control handed over to adoption system
Mover submission initiated
Mover adoption initiated for Mover-OID 0x{0,X} of system {1}
Finished mover submission
Mover detectec at TransferArea. Enable mover transfer for feedback update.
Mover adoption is done
Mover-OID 0x{0,X} from system {1} requested mover adoption of Mover-OID 0x{2,X}
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Defined parametrization set could not be found. Hence, parameters haven't been changed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Implausible mover position. Mover was removed from current movement area.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid basic inertia. Basic inertia is set to standard inertia (plain mover).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid payload inertia. Payload inertia is set to zero.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid mover feedback. Mover was removed from current movement area.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid controller parameters of axis {1}. Controller parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid feedforward parameters of axis {1}. Feedforward parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid observer parameters of axis {1}. Observer parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] DC synchronization interrupted during mover transfer.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Canceling Mover transfer not possible. Relevant data is currently exchanged.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Failed to retrieve external feedback interface. Check the external feedback OID parameter is correct.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid external feedback observer parameters of axis {1}. Observer parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] There is either no payload on the mover to be detected or the payload is too light (less than 0.1 kg).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] During payload identification process the force or power limits by the tile were exceeded and the result would be meaningless.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Position offset out of allowed range ({1} axis)
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Defined external feedback parametrization set could not be found.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid Kalman filter parameters of axis {1}. Kalman filter parameters are set to default.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile hardware warning (Value of CoE register 0x81430: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs have not changed since last cycle.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs were missed for one cycle.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] FB Inputs implausible switch position (expected: {1}, actual: {2}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Enabling time invalid. Must be between 0.1 s and 4.0 s.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Disabling time invalid. Must be between 0.1 s and 4.0 s.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Enabling height invalid. Must be between 0.5 mm and 5.0 mm.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Connection has been interrupted
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No free capacity
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Reconnected system (System ID: {1}) is not the same as the initially connected system (System ID: {2})
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Preparation of adoption system failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not create multicomputing command (HRESULT: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submission setup failed (HRESULT: 0x{1,X}).
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reserve mover for system transfer.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not finish mover adoption.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Target system reported an error. Communication has been terminated.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not process all responses ({1} of {2})
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover 0x{1,X} is not able to identify.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} mover(s) have an error, e.g. mover 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The configured BTN '{1}' was not identified on the system.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover type. Mover 0x{1,X} is a mover type that cannot communicate.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] BTN '{1}' was identified multiple times.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} tile(s) have an invalid firmware version, e.g. tile 0x{2,X}. Firmware must be at least version 4. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] DC link voltage of {1} tile(s) is not ok, e.g. tile 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Part 0x{1,X} has an error. {2} tiles of this part have an error. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] {1} mover(s) are activated, e.g. mover 0x{2,X}. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Identified BTN '{1}' is not configured.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No movers were found on the system. Coordinated mover communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover type. Mover 0x{1,X} is a mover type which orientation cannot be determined yet.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Preparation for mover communication of mover 0x{1,X} failed. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication of mover 0x{1,X} failed. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The determined orientation of mover 0x{1,X} is uncertain. Coordinated mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Peers with the same target musst be assigned to the same task
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reach defined start height
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Initialization failed
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Actual position is outside of movement area. Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] NC mapping error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Feedback error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not determine NC cycle time. Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Position setpoints are unreachable (axis = {1}; position setpoint = {2,f}; actual position = {3,f}). Initiating mover stop
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not enter movement area
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Observer error. Invalid observer parameters seem to be configured.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is rotated. Enabling is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters exceed the maximum limit. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters exceed the maximum limit. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are greater than the maximum force parameters. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters are below zero. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are below zero. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Maximum force limit parameters are equal to zero in at least 1 DOF. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Minimum force limit parameters are equal to zero in at least 1 DOF. Parameters stay the same.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] C setpoint is unreachable at this position. Initiating mover stop.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No rotation feedback available. Initiating mover stop.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is not assigned to any movement area. Enabling is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is not allowed to leave movement area when it is activated. Disable mover first!
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Commanded Part OID from NC (0x{1,X}) not found.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is on part with error. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover uses deactivated part. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot enable because the part and the tiles could not be enabled. Switching into error state.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover has an error. Communication attempt is aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Invalid tile firmware. Firmware version must at least be 4. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile DC link voltage too low. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] System could not be switched on. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover file transfer failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot be reset because part does not reset.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover orientation determination is not allowed for the configured mover type.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One or more Parts used by the mover have an error. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover communication not possible. Either no ID bumper is configured or the configured mover type does not allow communication.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is activated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Determined mover orientation is uncertain.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover cannot be reenabled right now because the current NC setpoints are out of range.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not cancel mover transfer
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Finishing mover submission failed
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not finish mover adoption
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Removed Mover from movement area due to lost EtherCAT connection of one or more used Tiles
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] External feedback deviation too large on axis {1}.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Activate mover transfer failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Canceled mover transfer because of interrupted DC synchronization.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is between to XPlanar systems and mover transfer is not activated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover bumper exceeds the tile area. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Wrong mover firmware. Firmware version must be greater than 3. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Transmission of the message to the mover failed. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The signal level of the mover answer is too low. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The message received from the mover is invalid. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover is rotated and cannot be orientated. Communication aborted.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mover position changed during communication. Mover orientation cannot be determined.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No communication could be established with the mover. Mover communication failed.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] In TwinCAT Measurement Bode Plot an NC2 axis has been chosen to be measured that was previously not linked in the mover tmc.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] EtherCAT communication is lost. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Power supply temperature ({1,f} °C) exceeds the limit of {2,f} °C. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Tile temperature {1} ({2,f} °C) exceeds the limit of {3,f} °C. System is shut down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Hardware error
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Could not reset Tile
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One tile of this part has an error. The part, its tiles and its movers are shutting down.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Part redetection is not possible.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submovers are in different movement areas.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Mismatch of Submovers positions.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Software coupling cannot be initialized. Check parameters and movers' positions.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] Submover has an error in software coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No memory can be assigned the software coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The number of submovers is not supported for the coupling.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The submover's control is off.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The setpoints for the software coupling are invalid.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] One of submovers touch the power limit, and the coupling is disabled.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] The active index is not available.
[Event ID: 0x{0,X}] No free transfer variables left. Please check configuration of XPlanarPeer.

Detail.Name: Comment
Detail.Text: Manages all XPlanar event logger messages
